summary: Iteration 35: Comprehensive testing of Reading Assignments (Leseaufgaben) feature. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified all key features working correctly including Dashboard section, Article Editor configuration, and Article View banner.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test article 'art_131780fdcaf7' for reading assignment testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reading Assignments feature fully functional. Editor password is 'Test1234!' (not 'password'). Test article 'art_131780fdcaf7' has reading assignment enabled for editor user.

backend_api_create_assignment.details: POST /api/reading-assignments creates assignments and returns assigned_count

backend_api_my_assignments.details: GET /api/reading-assignments/my-assignments returns unread articles with article details and assigned_by_name

backend_api_mark_as_read.details: POST /api/reading-assignments/mark-as-read marks article as read, removes from my-assignments list

backend_api_reading_status.details: GET /api/reading-assignments/status/{article_id} returns has_assignment, is_read, assigned_at, read_at

backend_api_delete_assignment.details: DELETE /api/reading-assignments/{article_id} removes all assignments for article

backend_api_all_status.details: GET /api/reading-assignments/article/{article_id}/all-status returns all user statuses (admin/author only)

frontend_dashboard_leseaufgaben_section.details: Dashboard shows 'Leseaufgaben' section with orange styling when unread articles exist

frontend_dashboard_unread_badge.details: '1 Ungelesen' badge with pulsing animation visible in section header

frontend_dashboard_assignment_card.details: ReadingAssignmentCard shows article title, 'Von [assigner]', date, 'Ungelesen' badge, and checkmark button

frontend_dashboard_mark_read_button.details: CheckCircle2 button on card allows marking as read directly from dashboard

frontend_article_view_banner.details: Orange banner 'Dieser Artikel wurde Ihnen als Leseaufgabe zugewiesen' visible in article view

frontend_article_view_mark_read_btn.details: 'Als gelesen markieren' button in article view banner

frontend_editor_leseaufgabe_card.details: 'Leseaufgabe' card in article editor sidebar with checkbox 'Als Leseaufgabe zuweisen'

frontend_editor_user_selection.details: User selection list with checkboxes, shows Admin badge for admin users

frontend_editor_group_selection.details: Group selection list with checkboxes (Vertrieb, SysAd, IT, Resula)

frontend_editor_selection_counter.details: 'X Benutzer und Y Gruppen ausgewählt' counter visible

frontend_editor_save_button.details: 'Leseaufgaben zuweisen & benachrichtigen' button with Mail icon

screenshots: .screenshots/iter35_05_final.png - Article view with reading assignment banner

notes.email_notification: E-Mail-Versand ist konfiguriert (SMTP_PASSWORD vorhanden). send_reading_assignment_notification wird als BackgroundTask aufgerufen.
notes.editor_password: Editor password is 'Test1234!' not 'password' as mentioned in review request
